description_long: This storage box is a cubic container constructed from wood, featuring a recessed central panel on each side and a pronounced frame around the edges. The wood grain is visible throughout, with vertical streaks and natural imperfections that give it a rustic, weathered appearance. The top of the box is flat and bordered by a raised lip, suggesting it may serve as a lid or cover, though no hinges or handles are visible. The box appears solid and robust, suitable for storing tools, supplies, or miscellaneous items in an urban environment such as a garage, workshop, or outdoor area. There are no visible locking mechanisms, handles, or labeling areas, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The overall finish is matte with a slightly rough texture, typical of untreated or lightly finished wood.
description: A rustic, cubic wooden storage box with recessed panels, visible wood grain, and a flat, framed top. The design is robust and utilitarian, lacking handles or locks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed central panel and pronounced wooden frame, with visible wood grain and natural imperfections.
description_view_1: Similar to view 0, this side also displays the recessed panel and wood texture, with slight variation in grain pattern.
description_view_2: Another side view with a slightly darker wood tone and more pronounced vertical streaks in the grain.
description_view_3: This view shows a lighter, more uniform wood surface with fewer visible imperfections, maintaining the same recessed panel design.
